title: Ondo seeks SEC clearance for tokenized equities model on Ethereum
message_html: Ondo seeks SEC clearance for tokenized equities model on Ethereum ...
snippet: The SEC is signaling openness to tokenization, encouraging firms to engage directly as it fine-tunes regulations.

title: Y Combinator settles first all-stablecoin funding in USDC on Solana
message_html: Y Combinator settles first all-stablecoin funding in USDC on Solana ...
snippet: The accelerator settled $500,000 in USDC funding on Solana for Totalis, marking its first all-stablecoin investment.

title: Justice Department opens compensation for victims of $4B OneCoin crypto fraud
message_html: Justice Department opens compensation for victims of $4B OneCoin crypto fraud ...
snippet: OneCoin was launched by Ruja Ignatova and Karl Sebastian Greenwood in Bulgaria. Ignatova has been missing since 2017, and Greenwood was sentenced to 20 years in prison.
